habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Ink Cloud (Ex) A tojanida can emit a 30-foot-radius sphere of ink once per minute as a free action. The ink provides total concealment in water, and persists for 1 minute. If used out of the water, the jet of ink is a line 30 feet long, and creatures in the area must succeed at a DC 16 Reflex save or be blinded for 1 round. The save DC is Constitution-based.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Ink Cloud (Ex) A tojanida can emit a 30-foot-radius sphere of ink once per minute as a free action. The ink provides total concealment in water, and persists for 1 minute. If used out of the water, the jet of ink is a line 30 feet long, and creatures in the area must succeed at a DC 16 Reflex save or be blinded for 1 round. The save DC is Constitution-based.

fullStatBlock:
CR 5
Tojanida
N Medium outsider extraplanar, water
Init +1
Senses all-around vision, darkvision 60 ft.; Perception +14
AC 21, touch 12, flat-footed 19 (+1 Dex, +1 dodge, +9 natural)
hp 51 (6d10+18)
Fort +8, Ref +6, Will +3
Speed 10 ft., swim 90 ft.
Melee bite +9 (1d6+3), 2 claws +9 (1d6+3)
Special Attacks ink cloud
Special Abilities Ink Cloud (Ex) A tojanida can emit a 30-foot-radius sphere of ink once per minute as a free action. The ink provides total concealment in water, and persists for 1 minute. If used out of the water, the jet of ink is a line 30 feet long, and creatures in the area must succeed at a DC 16 Reflex save or be blinded for 1 round. The save DC is Constitution-based.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 16, Dex 13, Con 17, Int 10, Wis 12, Cha 9
Base Atk +6; CMB +9; CMD 21
Feats Blind-Fight, Dodge, Power Attack
Skills Bluff +5, Escape Artist +10, Knowledge (planes) +9, Perception +14, Perform (act) +5, Sense Motive +10, Stealth +7, Survival +7, Swim +11
Languages Aquan
Environment  any water (Plane of Water)
Organization solitary, pair, clutch (3-6), or cult (1 tojanida plus 2-12 humanoid followers)
Treasure standard
Resist electricity 10, fire 10
Source PFRPG Bestiary 3
